response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in professional industrial or embedded systems contexts beyond a brief role at National Instruments, and shows no evidence of experience with message brokers, IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial settings, or multi-threaded high-performance C++ systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript and cloud tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills (talks, workshops, documentation)
Proven ability to work across diverse systems, including embedded and real-time applications (DLang, C++)
concerns: No recent or substantial professional C++ development experience beyond entry-level role 10+ years ago
Absence of any demonstrable experience with industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus) or IEC 62443 security standards
Lack of evidence in resume for designing scalable, multi-threaded C++ systems or message-broker architectures
